name: hostname-object
description: Contains details about the hostname and its status.

activeInProduction.description: Whether the hostname is active in the production network.

activeInStaging.description: Whether the hostname is active in the staging network.

arlInclusion.description: Whether the hostname is Akamai Resource Locator (ARL) included.

configIdInProduction.description: Uniquely identifies the configuration that protects the hostname.

configNameInProduction.description: The name of the configuration that protects the hostname.
